title: expand_str
subject:
Write a program that takes one string and prints it, followed by a newline, with leading and trailing spaces/tabs removed and every gap of spaces/tabs between words replaced by exactly three spaces.

If the number of arguments is not exactly 1, or the trimmed string is empty, print just a newline.

Examples:
  $ ./a.out "  hello   world  "
  hello   world
  $ ./a.out "a b"
  a   b
